@conorsen: “It’s still so early” as an argument against there being the possibility of a bubble/major downturn has an obvious counterargument in internet adoption levels in 2000 vs say 2015.
@conorsen: Office leases are 7-10 years — occupancy today is a function of conditions from years ago. Net absorption is what you want to track for current demand.
@conorsen: Downtown office demand has largely gone away.
@KobeissiLetter: BREAKING: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif says the US and Iran are "closer to a peace deal than ever" with finalization of the deal expected in the next 24 hours.
@"We are confident that this historic peace deal will form a strong foundation for lasting peace," he says.: BREAKING

items.text: @unusual_whales: In recent weeks, Iran has dramatically escalated efforts to seal off its cache of near bomb-grade uranium, deliberately collapsing tunnels and booby-trapping entrances with explosive mines, per CNN
